question: church is seen at night with a police car parked in front and a police officer on the street. What is unique about the police car parked near the church in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The police car is black with red lights. (B) The police car is blue with white lights. (C) The police car is silver with red lights. (D) The police car is white with blue lights.
gold_answer: The police car is white with blue lights
answer_choices: The police car is black with red lights
The police car is blue with white lights
The police car is silver with red lights
The police car is white with blue lights
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
